misc: Doubles as a professional model as his side hustle
Few players dare to give him lip due to his intimidating presence and wrestling skills
biography: Olli, a force to be reckoned with on the green, hails from the prestigious Helsingin Golfklubi. Beyond the manicured lawns and challenging fairways, Olli cultivates a second career as a professional model.
Few would dare challenge Olli, not only for his prowess with a golf club, but also for his imposing presence and rumored wrestling skills.

With eight past appearances at the Hector Trophée, Olli is a familiar face at the event. Though the coveted Hector Trophée and the Victor Trophy have eluded him thus far, Olli remains a formidable competitor. This year marks Olli's ninth appearance, and he is undoubtedly aiming to make it a memorable one.
